title: Death Guard - 11th Edition Rules
subtitle: Army rules, nine detachments, faction updates and current datasheets

blocks.text: If your Army Faction is DEATH GUARD, while an enemy unit is within Contagion Range of one or more DEATH GUARD models from your army, it is Afflicted.
Contagion Range cannot be greater than 12" after modifiers.

During the Declare Battle Formations step, select one of the Plagues below. Until the end of the battle, while an enemy unit is Afflicted, subtract 1 from the Toughness characteristic of models in that unit, and that unit has the effect of your chosen Plague.

blocks.title: Skullsquirm Blight
blocks.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

blocks.title: Rattlejoint Ague
blocks.text: Worsen the Save characteristic of models in this unit by 1.

blocks.title: Scabrous Soulrot
blocks.text: Worsen the Move, Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in this unit by 1. This rule can only worsen a model’s Objective Control characteristic to a minimum of 1.
When mustering your army, unless specifically stated otherwise, you cannot select PLAGUE LEGIONS as your Army Faction.
Force Disposition: Take and Hold. Detachment Points: 3DP.
Source: Codex: Death Guard transcription.

blocks.title: Worldblight
blocks.text: If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase and a DEATH GUARD unit from your army (excluding Battle-shocked units) is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase. In addition, until you lose control of that objective marker, it has the Nurgle’s Gift ability as if it were a DEATH GUARD model from your army.

blocks.title: Daemon Weapon of Nurgle - 10 pts
blocks.text: DEATH GUARD model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

blocks.title: Furnace of Plagues - 25 pts
blocks.text: DEATH GUARD model only. Add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of the bearers melee weapons, and the bearer’s melee weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

blocks.title: Arch Contaminator - 25 pts
blocks.text: DEATH GUARD model only. While the bearer’s unit is within range of an objective marker you control, each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

blocks.title: Revolting Regeneration - 30 pts
blocks.text: DEATH GUARD model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

blocks.title: PUTRID DETONATION - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Any phase.

TARGET: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE or DEATH GUARD MONSTER model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.

EFFECT: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted. In addition, any enemy units that suffer mortal wounds as a result of this Stratagem are Afflicted until the start of your next turn.

blocks.title: DISGUSTINGLY RESILIENT - 2CP
lines: WHEN: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
TARGET: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

blocks.title: PLAGUESURGE - 2CP
lines: WHEN: Your Command phase.
TARGET: Your DEATH GUARD WARLORD that is on the battlefield.
EFFECT: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 3" to the Contagion Range of models from your army.

blocks.title: LEECHSPORE ERUPTION - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Your Command phase.
TARGET: One DEATH GUARD model your army that has lost one or more wounds.

EFFECT: Select one enemy unit within 3" of your model. Roll a number of D6 equal to the number of wounds your model has lost: for each 5+, that enemy unit suffers one mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds) and your model regains 1 lost wound (to a maximum of 6 lost wounds).

blocks.title: OVERWHELMING GENEROSITY - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Start of your Shooting phase.
TARGET: One DEATH GUARD CHARACTER unit from your army.

EFFECT: Select one enemy unit visible to your unit. Until the end of the phase, each time a DEATH GUARD unit from your army selects that enemy unit as the target of any ranged attacks, you can re-roll the dice to determine how many attacks a weapon equipped by a model in that unit makes.

blocks.title: CREEPING BLIGHT - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Your Shooting phase.
TARGET: One DEATH GUARD INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an Afflicted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

blocks.text: Force Disposition: Purge the Foe. Detachment Points: 2DP. Tag: ENGINES.
Source: Codex: Death Guard transcription.

blocks.title: Miasmic Bombardment
blocks.text: At the start of the battle round, select a number of enemy units more than 12" away from every model from your army that is on the battlefield. Until the end of the battle round, those enemy units are Afflicted. The maximum number of units you can select in this way depends on the battle size, as shown below.

blocks.title: Eye of Affliction - 20 pts
blocks.text: DEATH GUARD model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [ignores cover] ability while targeting an Afflicted enemy unit.

blocks.title: Bilemaw Blight - 10 pts
blocks.text: MALIGNANT PLAGUECASTER only. At the start of your Shooting phase, until the end of the phase, add 12" to the Range characteristics of the bearer’s Plague Wind weapon.

blocks.title: Shriekworm Familiar - 15 pts
blocks.text: DEATH GUARD model only. Once per battle round, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP.

blocks.title: Tendrilous Emissions - 30 pts
blocks.text: LORD OF VIRULENCE only. While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly DEATH GUARD VEHICLE units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability, and each time one of those VEHICLE units makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit visible to the bearer, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

blocks.title: BLIGHTED LAND - 2CP
lines: WHEN: End of your Movement phase.
TARGET: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army.
EFFECT: Select one terrain feature within 24" of and visible to your unit. Until the start of your next turn, enemy units are Afflicted while they are within 3" of that terrain feature.

blocks.title: RELENTLESS GRIND - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
TARGET: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

blocks.title: DRAWN TO DESPAIR - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Your Shooting phase.
TARGET: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a visible enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT) within your opponent’s deployment zone, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

blocks.title: FONT OF FILTH - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Your Shooting phase.
TARGET: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

blocks.title: EYESTINGER STORM - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Your opponent’s Command phase.
TARGET: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army.

EFFECT: Select one objective marker visible to one or more models in your unit. Each Afflicted enemy unit within range of that objective marker must take a Battle-shock test. Enemy units affected by this Stratagem do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

blocks.title: STINKING MIRE - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.
TARGET: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit selects your unit as the target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

blocks.text: Force Disposition: Take and Hold. Detachment Points: 2DP. Tag: FLYBLOWN.
Source: Codex: Death Guard transcription.

blocks.title: Manifold Maladies
blocks.text: At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the Plagues listed in Nurgle’s Gift. Until the end of the battle, that is your chosen Plague instead of any previously chosen Plague.

blocks.title: Final Ingredient - 20 pts
blocks.text: BIOLOGUS PUTRIFIER only. Once per battle, after the bearers unit has fought, if one or more CHARACTER models were destroyed as a result of those attacks, select one Plague. Until the end of the battle, while an enemy unit is Afflicted, that unit has the effect of the selected Plague in addition to any other.

blocks.title: Visions of Virulence - 15 pts
blocks.text: MALIGNANT PLAGUECASTER only. While an enemy unit is enfeebled by the bearer’s Pestilent Fallout ability, that unit is also Afflicted.

blocks.title: Needle of Nurgle - 25 pts
blocks.text: PLAGUE SURGEON only. Each time the bearer uses its Tainted Narthecium ability, you can return up to D3 destroyed models to the bearer’s unit (instead of 1).

blocks.title: Cornucophagus - 35 pts
blocks.text: LORD OF POXES only. In the Declare Battle Formations step select one Plague. Until the end of the battle, while an enemy unit is within Contagion Range of the bearer, that enemy unit has the effect of that Plague in addition to any other.

blocks.title: BLESSINGS OF FILTH - 1CP
blocks.category: Champions of Contagion – Battle Tactic Stratagem
lines: WHEN: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
TARGET: One DEATH GUARD Attached unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

blocks.title: MALIGNANCE MAGNIFIED - 2CP
blocks.category: Champions of Contagion – Battle Tactic Stratagem
lines: WHEN: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
TARGET: One DEATH GUARD Attached unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

blocks.title: GROTESQUE FORTITUDE - 1CP
blocks.category: Champions of Contagion – Battle Tactic Stratagem
lines: WHEN: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
TARGET: One DEATH GUARD Attached unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Toughness characteristic of models in your unit.

blocks.title: RABID INFUSION - 1CP
blocks.category: Champions of Contagion – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
lines: WHEN: Start of the Fight phase.
TARGET: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that includes two CHARACTER models.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Fights First ability.

blocks.title: MOBILE VECTOR - 1CP
blocks.category: Champions of Contagion – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
lines: WHEN: Your Movement phase, before the Reinforcements step.
TARGET: One DEATH GUARD CHARACTER unit from your army that is not leading a unit.

EFFECT: Select one other friendly DEATH GUARD unit (excluding Battle-shocked units and Attached units that already have two Leader units or one of your CHARACTER units leading it] within 2" horizontally and 5" vertically of your unit that your unit can lead (as described in the Leader section of its datasheet]. Your unit attaches to that unit as a Leader. Change that unit’s Starting Strength accordingly.

blocks.title: DEATH’S HEADS - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Your Shooting phase.
TARGET: One BIOLOGUS PUTRIFIER unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
EFFECT: Select one enemy unit (excluding VEHICLES) that is within 8" of and visible to your unit. Until the start of your next turn, that unit has the effect of all Plagues (see Nurgle’s Gift).

blocks.text: Force Disposition: Disruption. Detachment Points: 2DP.
Source: Codex: Death Guard transcription.

blocks.title: Reverberant Rancidity
blocks.text: While a PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army is within 7" of one or more DEATH GUARD units from your army, it has the Nurgle’s Gift ability. While a DEATH GUARD unit from your army is within 7" of one or more PLAGUE LEGIONS units from your army, add 3" to that DEATH GUARD unit’s Contagion Range.
You can include PLAGUE LEGIONS units in your army even if your Army Faction is DEATH GUARD. The combined points cost of such units depends on the battle size, as shown below.
No PLAGUE LEGIONS model from your army can be your WARLORD.

blocks.title: Beckoning Blight - 20 pts
blocks.text: DEATH GUARD model only. Each time a PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, if it is set up wholly within 12" of the bearer, it can be set up anywhere that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models, instead of more than 8".

blocks.title: Fell Harvester - 10 pts
blocks.text: DEATH GUARD model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.

blocks.title: Entropic Knell - 15 pts
blocks.text: GREAT UNCLEAN ONE only. In the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, each enemy unit within 6" of the bearer that is below its Starting Strength must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

blocks.title: Tome of Bounteous Blessings - 20 pts
blocks.text: MALIGNANT PLAGUECASTER only. Each time a PLAGUE LEGIONS unit within 12" of the bearer takes a Battle-shock test, add 1 to that test and, if that test is passed, one model in that unit regains up to D3 lost wounds (if that unit is a BATTLELINE unit and that test is passed, up to D3 destroyed models can be returned to that unit instead).

blocks.title: PERSISTENT PESTS - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Any phase.
TARGET: One NURGLINGS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can target that unit with this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.
EFFECT: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength and with its full wounds remaining.
RESTRICTIONS: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.

blocks.title: CLUTCHING CORRUPTION - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Fight phase.
TARGET: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more PLAGUE LEGIONS units from your army, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

blocks.title: ALL IS ROT - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Your Shooting phase.
TARGET: One PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, enemy units are not considered to be within Engagement Range of your unit for the purposes of selecting targets of ranged weapons. Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model loses a wound, while that model’s unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, roll one D6: on a 5+, your unit suffers 1 mortal wound after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks.

blocks.title: FLESHY AVALANCHE - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
TARGET: One PLAGUE LEGIONS MONSTER unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

blocks.title: AVATARS OF DECAY - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Your Shooting phase.
TARGET: One PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, while an enemy unit is within 6" of your unit, that enemy unit is Afflicted.

blocks.title: MIRESLICK - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is selected to Fall Back.
TARGET: One PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, while an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, each time that unit is selected to Fall Back, it must take a Leadership test. If that test is failed, that unit must Remain Stationary this phase instead.

blocks.text: Force Disposition: Disruption. Detachment Points: 2DP.
Source: Codex: Death Guard transcription.

blocks.title: Numberless Horde
blocks.text: In your Command phase in each of the following battle rounds, depending on your chosen battle size, add a new POXWALKERS unit with a Starting Strength of 10 to your army, in Strategic Reserves.
POXWALKERS units from your army gain the BATTLELINE keyword.

blocks.title: Witherbone Pipes - 25 pts
blocks.text: NOXIOUS BLIGHTBRINGER only. While the bearer is leading a POXWALKERS unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit, and each time that unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, add 1 to that test.

blocks.title: Lord of the Walking Pox - 15 pts
blocks.text: DEATH GUARD model only. If the bearer is leading a POXWALKER unit, and is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round as the third battle round.

blocks.title: Sorrowsyphon - 10 pts
blocks.text: MALIGNANT PLAGUECASTER only. While the bearer is leading a POXWALKERS unit, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s Plague Wind weapon. Each time the bearer makes one or more attacks with a Plague Wind weapon, after the bearer’s unit has resolved its attacks, D3 Bodyguard models from the bearer’s unit are destroyed.

blocks.title: Talisman of Burgeoning - 25 pts
blocks.text: DEATH GUARD model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of POXWALKERS models in that unit.

blocks.title: GRIP OF THE WALKING POX - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
TARGET: One POXWALKERS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

EFFECT: After the attacking unit has fought, roll one D6 for each model from your unit that was destroyed as a result of those attacks: on a 6, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound. If your unit is not destroyed after the attacking unit has fought, enemy models destroyed as a result of this Stratagem count as enemy models destroyed by an attack made by a model in your unit for the purposes of the Curse of the Walking Pox ability.

blocks.title: SMEARED WITH FILTH - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Fight phase.
TARGET: One POXWALKERS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can target that unit with this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.
EFFECT: Select one enemy unit that made one or more attacks that targeted your unit this phase. Until the end of the battle, that enemy unit is Afflicted.

blocks.title: GNAWING HUNGER - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Your Command phase.
TARGET: One POXWALKERS unit from your army.
EFFECT: Until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Move characteristic of models in your unit, and add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit.

blocks.title: HIDDEN AMONGST THE DEAD - 1CP
lines: WHEN: The Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
TARGET: One POXWALKERS unit from your army that is in Strategic Reserves and that is not an Attached unit.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, models in that unit have the Deep Strike ability.

blocks.title: SHOCK AND HORROR - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Your Charge phase, just after a DEATH GUARD unit from your army ends a Charge move.
TARGET: That DEATH GUARD unit.
EFFECT: Each enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

blocks.title: SHAMBLING WALL - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

TARGET: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks, and one friendly POXWALKERS unit within 3" of your unit and visible to both your unit and the attacking unit.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time you would allocate an attack to a model in your DEATH GUARD unit, if your POXWALKERS unit is visible to the attacking model and is an eligible target for that attack, no saving throw is made for that attack; instead a number of POXWALKERS from your POXWALKERS unit equal to the Damage characteristic of that attack are destroyed.

blocks.text: Force Disposition: Priority Assets. Detachment Points: 2DP.
Source: Codex: Death Guard transcription.

blocks.title: Deadly Vectors
blocks.text: In your opponent’s Command phase, roll 2D6 for each Afflicted enemy unit, subtracting 1 from the result if that unit is Below Half-strength. If the result is 6 or less, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

blocks.title: Face of Death - 10 pts
blocks.text: TERMINATOR model only. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit must take a Battle-shock test.

blocks.title: Vile Vigour - 15 pts
blocks.text: TERMINATOR model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1" to the Movement characteristic of models in that unit and you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

blocks.title: Warprot Talisman - 30 pts
blocks.text: TERMINATOR model only. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

blocks.title: Helm of the Fly King - 20 pts
blocks.text: TERMINATOR model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking model is within 18".

blocks.title: BLOOMING PESTILENCE - 1CP
blocks.category: Death Lord’s Chosen – Epic Deed Stratagem
lines: WHEN: Start of any phase.
TARGET: One TERMINATOR unit from your army.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, add 3" to the Contagion Range of models in your unit.

blocks.title: GRIM REAPERS - 1CP
blocks.category: Death Lord’s Chosen – Battle Tactic Stratagem
lines: WHEN: Fight phase.
TARGET: One TERMINATOR unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) you can re-roll the Hit roll.

blocks.title: UNDYING SPITE - 1CP
blocks.category: Death Lord’s Chosen – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
lines: WHEN: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
TARGET: One TERMINATOR unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

blocks.title: SIGNAL POX - 1CP
blocks.category: Death Lord’s Chosen – Epic Deed Stratagem
lines: WHEN: Your Command phase.
TARGET: One LORD OF VIRULENCE model from your army.
EFFECT: Select one objective marker within 30" of and visible to your model. Until the start of your next turn, while an enemy unit is within range of that objective marker, that unit is Afflicted.

blocks.title: MORTARION'S TEACHINGS - 1CP
blocks.category: Death Lord’s Chosen – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
lines: WHEN: Your Shooting phase.
TARGET: One TERMINATOR unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] and [HEAVY] abilities.

blocks.title: SICKENING IMPACT - 1CP
blocks.category: Death Lord’s Chosen – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
lines: WHEN: Your Charge phase, just after a TERMINATOR unit from your army ends a Charge move.
TARGET: That TERMINATOR unit.

EFFECT: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, then roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 2+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

blocks.text: Force Disposition: Purge the Foe. Detachment Points: 1DP. Tag: ENGINES.
Source: Death Guard Faction Pack v1.0, p.2.

subsections.title: Detachment Rule - Warped and Rusted Animus

blocks.title: Warped and Rusted Animus
blocks.text: Friendly FOETID BLOAT-DRONE/FOETID BLOAT-DRONE WITH HEAVY BLIGHT LAUNCHER/HELBRUTE/MYPHITIC BLIGHT-HAULER units have CONTAGION ENGINE. Friendly CONTAGION ENGINE units’ ranged attacks have [ASSAULT]. This detachment has the ENGINES tag and cannot be taken with another ENGINES detachment.

blocks.title: Parasitic Woe-Reaper - 15 pts
blocks.text: CONTAGION ENGINE unit only. When this unit has fought, one model in this unit heals D3 wounds.

blocks.title: Lancet of the Worldsore - 15 pts
blocks.text: Friendly HELBRUTE/MYPHITIC BLIGHT-HAULER unit only. This unit has MOBILE.

blocks.title: Fresh Vectors - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly CONTAGION ENGINE unit is selected to attack.
TARGET: That CONTAGION ENGINE unit.
EFFECT: Your unit’s attacks can re-roll wound rolls of 1.

blocks.title: Bloodrust Deluge - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly CONTAGION ENGINE unit is selected to shoot.
TARGET: That CONTAGION ENGINE unit.
EFFECT: Select one visible enemy unit. That enemy unit is Afflicted until your unit has attacked.

blocks.title: Soulrot Flux - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit is selected to make a Fall Back move, if that enemy unit is engaged with a friendly CONTAGION ENGINE unit.
TARGET: That CONTAGION ENGINE unit.

EFFECT: When an enemy unit engaged with your unit is selected to make a Fall Back move, roll one D6: on a 1, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

blocks.text: Force Disposition: Reconnaissance. Detachment Points: 1DP. Tag: FLYBLOWN.
Source: Death Guard Faction Pack v1.0, p.3.

blocks.title: Verminous Haze
blocks.text: In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to two friendly PLAGUE MARINES units. Those units have Infiltrators. This detachment has the FLYBLOWN tag and cannot be taken with another FLYBLOWN detachment.

blocks.title: Insectile Murmuration - 15 pts
blocks.text: PLAGUE MARINES unit only. When this unit’s attacks target a unit within Contagion Range of a friendly unit, those attacks can re-roll wound rolls of 1.

blocks.title: Plagueveil - 15 pts
blocks.text: PLAGUE MARINES unit only. This unit has -3" detection range.

blocks.title: Nauseating Paroxysms - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Start of the Fight phase.
TARGET: One friendly engaged PLAGUE MARINES unit.
EFFECT: Select one enemy unit engaged with your unit. That enemy unit makes a battle-shock roll, with -1 to that battle-shock roll.

blocks.title: Droning Horror - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly PLAGUE MARINES unit is selected to shoot.
TARGET: That PLAGUE MARINES unit.
EFFECT: Your unit’s ranged attacks can re-roll hit rolls of 1. Those attacks that target a unit within half range can re-roll wound rolls of 1.

blocks.title: Eye of the Swarm - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly PLAGUE MARINES unit is selected to shoot.
TARGET: That PLAGUE MARINES unit.
EFFECT: Your unit’s ranged attacks have [CLOSE-QUARTERS].

blocks.text: Force Disposition: Priority Assets. Detachment Points: 1DP.
Source: Death Guard Faction Pack v1.0, p.4.

blocks.title: Hypervirulent Strains
blocks.text: Friendly DEATH GUARD CHARACTER units have +3" to their Contagion Range (to a maximum of 12").

blocks.title: Rejuvenating Swarm - 20 pts
blocks.text: DEATH GUARD INFANTRY model only (excluding TERMINATOR models). Attacks that target this unit with a S greater than this unit’s T have -1 to wound rolls.

blocks.title: Host of the Hybridised Pox - 40 pts
blocks.text: DEATH GUARD INFANTRY model only. (Once per battle, per army) In your Command phase, you can use this ability. If you do, select one of the Plagues listed in Nurgle’s Gift. Enemy units within Contagion Range of this unit also have the effect of that Plague in addition to your army’s chosen Plague until the end of the battle.

blocks.title: Territorial Infection - 1CP
lines: WHEN: Start of the Command phase.
TARGET: One friendly DEATH GUARD CHARACTER unit.
EFFECT: Your unit has +1 OC until the end of the turn.

glossary.title: Anti
glossary.short: [ANTI-X Y+]: against a target with keyword X, an unmodified wound roll of Y+ is a critical wound.
glossary.full: This ability always takes the form [ANTI-X Y+]. Each time an attack is made with an [ANTI] weapon, if the target unit has the keyword denoted by X, an unmodified wound roll of Y+ is a critical wound.

glossary.title: Assault
glossary.short: A unit containing an [ASSAULT] weapon can use assault shooting.
glossary.full: Units containing one or more models with an [ASSAULT] weapon can shoot using assault shooting (Core Rules 10.05).

glossary.title: Blast
glossary.short: Adds attack dice according to the number of models in the target unit.
glossary.full: Each time you gather attack dice for a [BLAST] weapon, add one additional attack die for every five models that were in the target unit in the Select Targets step (rounding down). If this ability takes the form [BLAST X], add X additional attack dice for every five such models instead.

glossary.title: Close-quarters
glossary.short: A unit containing a [CLOSE-QUARTERS] weapon can use close-quarters shooting.
glossary.full: Units containing one or more models with a [CLOSE-QUARTERS] weapon can shoot using close-quarters shooting (Core Rules 10.06). When using another shooting type, for each model in that unit (excluding MONSTER/VEHICLE models), you can only select either one or more of its [CLOSE-QUARTERS] weapons, or one or more of its other ranged weapons, to make attacks with.

glossary.title: Deadly Demise
glossary.short: Deadly Demise X can inflict X mortal wounds on nearby units when the model is destroyed.
glossary.full: This ability always takes the form Deadly Demise X. Each time a model in this unit is destroyed, after units embarked within it have made emergency disembark moves, roll one D6. On a 6, each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by X. If X is random, roll separately for each unit within 6".

glossary.title: Deep Strike
glossary.short: During an ingress move, set up more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units.
glossary.glossaryIntro: There are many ways by which to deploy troops to the field of battle, including tunnels, teleportation devices and other esoteric means of transportation.
glossary.full: Each time this unit makes an ingress move, if every model in this unit has this ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units, even if that is within your opponent’s deployment zone.

glossary.title: Devastating Wounds
glossary.short: A critical wound ends the attack sequence and inflicts mortal wounds equal to D.
glossary.full: Each time an attack made with a [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] weapon results in a critical wound, the attack sequence for that attack ends and the target unit suffers a number of mortal wounds equal to that weapon’s D characteristic. These are inflicted after resolving normal damage from those attacks. Mortal wounds inflicted this way can damage a maximum of one model for each critical wound; any remaining mortal wounds from that attack are lost.

glossary.title: Extra Attacks
glossary.short: These weapons are selected in addition to the model’s other melee weapon.
glossary.full: Each time a unit containing one or more models with an [EXTRA ATTACKS] weapon fights, those models make attacks with those weapons in addition to any others. In the Select Weapons step, for each of those models, select all of its [EXTRA ATTACKS] weapons and one of its other melee weapons, if possible.

glossary.title: Feel No Pain
glossary.short: Feel No Pain X+: each time the model would lose a wound, on X+ that wound is not lost.
glossary.full: This ability always takes the form Feel No Pain X+. Each time a model with this ability would lose a wound, roll one D6: on an X+, that wound is not lost.

glossary.title: Fights First
glossary.short: If every model has this ability, the unit is a Fights First unit.
glossary.full: While every model in a unit has this ability, that unit is a Fights First unit. See the Resolve Fights First Combats step in the Fight phase (Core Rules 12.04).

glossary.title: Firing Deck
glossary.short: Firing Deck X lets a Transport use selected ranged weapons of up to X embarked models.
glossary.full: This ability always takes the form Firing Deck X. In your Shooting phase, when this TRANSPORT is selected to shoot and one or more units are embarked within it: select up to X embarked models whose units have not already been selected to shoot; select one ranged weapon from each selected model (excluding [ONE SHOT]); until this TRANSPORT resolves all attacks it has those weapons in addition to its own; until the end of the turn, embarked units are not eligible to shoot.

glossary.title: Hazardous
glossary.short: After the unit attacks, make hazard rolls for the selected [HAZARDOUS] weapons.
glossary.full: Each time a unit is selected to shoot or fight, after it has resolved all of its attacks, make a number of hazard rolls for that unit equal to the number of [HAZARDOUS] weapons selected in the Select Weapons step.

glossary.title: Ignores Cover
glossary.short: The target cannot have the benefit of cover against this attack.
glossary.full: Each time an attack is made with an [IGNORES COVER] weapon, the target cannot have the benefit of cover against that attack, including from rules that give a model or unit the benefit of cover (for example, Stealth).

glossary.title: Indirect Fire
glossary.short: A unit containing an [INDIRECT FIRE] weapon can use indirect shooting.
glossary.full: Units containing one or more models with an [INDIRECT FIRE] weapon can shoot using indirect shooting (Core Rules 10.07).

glossary.title: Infiltrators
glossary.short: During deployment, set up more than 8" horizontally from the enemy deployment zone and all enemy units.
glossary.full: During deployment, if every model in a unit has this ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally from your opponent’s deployment zone and all enemy units.

glossary.title: Leader
glossary.short: A Leader can join an eligible Bodyguard unit to form an Attached unit.
glossary.full: Before the battle, in the Muster Armies step, for each Leader and Support unit in your army, you can select one friendly Bodyguard unit that unit can lead. That unit leads that Bodyguard unit for the battle and forms an Attached unit with it. Unless otherwise stated, each Bodyguard unit can only have one Leader unit and one Support unit attached to it.

glossary.title: Lethal Hits
glossary.short: On a critical hit, you can choose for that attack to automatically wound.
glossary.full: Each time an attack made with a [LETHAL HITS] weapon results in a critical hit, you can choose for that attack to automatically wound the target. No wound roll is made for an attack that automatically wounds, so it cannot result in a critical wound.

glossary.title: Lone Operative
glossary.short: Unless Attached, the unit is only visible to enemies within its specified range.
glossary.full: Unless part of an Attached unit, this unit is not visible to enemy models unless they are within 12" of it, and it cannot be targeted by [INDIRECT FIRE] weapons unless the attacking model is within 12". If this ability takes the form Lone Operative X", use X" instead.

glossary.title: Melta
glossary.short: [MELTA X]: within half range, add X to the weapon’s D characteristic.
glossary.full: This ability always takes the form [MELTA X]. Each time a model makes an attack with a [MELTA] weapon, if the target unit was within half range of that weapon in the Select Targets step, until the attacking unit’s attacks have been resolved, add X to that weapon’s D characteristic.

glossary.title: Pistol
glossary.short: [PISTOL] and [CLOSE-QUARTERS] are identical for all rules purposes.
glossary.full: [PISTOL] and [CLOSE-QUARTERS] are identical for all rules purposes. See [CLOSE-QUARTERS]. [PISTOL] is a pre-existing ability that will be superseded by [CLOSE-QUARTERS] as the edition progresses.

glossary.title: Precision
glossary.short: Can direct allocation to a visible Character group in the target Attached unit.
glossary.full: While resolving attacks made with one or more [PRECISION] weapons, at the start of the Allocation Order step, if the target unit contains one or more CHARACTER models visible to one or more attacking models, the active player can select one allocation group containing one of those visible CHARACTER models. That group remains the current allocation group until those attacks are resolved or that group is destroyed, whichever happens first.

glossary.title: Psychic
glossary.short: Can ignore modifiers to BS/WS and hit rolls for that attack.
glossary.full: Each time an attack is made with a [PSYCHIC] weapon, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s BS or WS characteristic and any or all modifiers to the hit roll. Attacks made with [PSYCHIC] weapons are psychic attacks.

glossary.title: Rapid Fire
glossary.short: [RAPID FIRE X]: add X attack dice if the target was within half range.
glossary.full: This ability always takes the form [RAPID FIRE X]. Each time you gather attack dice for a [RAPID FIRE] weapon, add X additional attack dice if the target unit was within half range of that weapon in the Select Targets step.

glossary.title: Stealth
glossary.short: If every model has Stealth, the unit has the benefit of cover against ranged attacks.
glossary.full: If every model in a unit has this ability, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, that unit has the benefit of cover against that attack.

glossary.title: Support
glossary.short: A Support unit can join an eligible Bodyguard unit to form an Attached unit.
glossary.full: Before the battle, in the Muster Armies step, for each Leader and Support unit in your army, you can select one friendly Bodyguard unit that unit can lead. That unit leads that Bodyguard unit for the battle and forms an Attached unit with it. Unless otherwise stated, each Bodyguard unit can only have one Leader unit and one Support unit attached to it.

glossary.title: Sustained Hits
glossary.short: [SUSTAINED HITS X]: a critical hit produces X additional hits.
glossary.full: This ability always takes the form [SUSTAINED HITS X]. Each time an attack made with a [SUSTAINED HITS] weapon results in a critical hit, that attack results in a number of additional hits on the target as denoted by X.

glossary.title: Torrent
glossary.short: The attack automatically hits the target.
glossary.full: Each time an attack is made with a [TORRENT] weapon, that attack automatically hits the target.

glossary.title: Twin-linked
glossary.short: You can re-roll the wound roll.
glossary.full: Each time an attack is made with a [TWIN-LINKED] weapon, you can re-roll the wound roll.

glossary.title: Detection Range
glossary.short: Hidden models can only be visible to enemies within their Detection Range; normally 15".
glossary.full: While a model is Hidden, it can only be visible to enemy models that are within its Detection Range. Unless otherwise stated, a model’s Detection Range is 15".

glossary.title: Frame
glossary.short: Measure to and from the closest point on a FRAME model.
glossary.full: Whenever a rule refers to a model’s position in relation to anything else on the battlefield, if that model has the FRAME keyword, unless otherwise stated, measure to and from the closest point on that model, not necessarily from its base. When rotating a FRAME model as part of a move, if it has no base, turn it any amount around its central axis while keeping it upright.

glossary.title: Mobile
glossary.short: MOBILE models can move horizontally through dense terrain features.
glossary.full: Models with the MOBILE keyword can move horizontally through dense terrain features under Terrain and Movement (Core Rules 13.06).

glossary.title: Attached Unit
glossary.short: A Leader and/or Support unit joined to a Bodyguard unit; it is one unit for all rules purposes.
glossary.full: An Attached unit is a single unit for all rules purposes. If it contains Bodyguard models, use the highest T characteristic of its Bodyguard models while resolving attacks against it. If it only contains Leader/Support models, use the highest T among those models. It has all keywords of all component units, but its models do not gain each other’s keywords. Unit-wide abilities apply to every model until the source described in Core Rules 19.04 is destroyed.

glossary.title: Nurgle’s Gift
glossary.short: Death Guard Army Rule.
glossary.full: While an enemy unit is within Contagion Range of one or more DEATH GUARD models from your army, it is Afflicted.

glossary.title: Contagion Range
glossary.short: 3" in battle round 1, 6" in battle round 2, 9" from battle round 3 onward.
glossary.full: Contagion Range cannot be greater than 12" after modifiers.

glossary.title: Afflicted
glossary.short: An enemy unit within Contagion Range.
glossary.full: While an enemy unit is Afflicted, subtract 1 from the Toughness characteristic of models in that unit, and that unit has the effect of your chosen Plague.

glossary.title: Skullsquirm Blight
glossary.short: A Plague selected during Declare Battle Formations.
glossary.full: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

glossary.title: Rattlejoint Ague
glossary.short: A Plague selected during Declare Battle Formations.
glossary.full: Worsen the Save characteristic of models in this unit by 1.

glossary.title: Scabrous Soulrot
glossary.short: A Plague selected during Declare Battle Formations.
glossary.full: Worsen the Move, Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in this unit by 1. This rule can only worsen Objective Control to a minimum of 1.

glossary.title: Virulent Vectorium
glossary.short: Take and Hold, 3DP.
glossary.full: If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase and a DEATH GUARD unit from your army (excluding Battle-shocked units) is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase. In addition, until you lose control of that objective marker, it has the Nurgle’s Gift ability as if it were a DEATH GUARD model from your army.

glossary.title: Worldblight
glossary.short: If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase and a DEATH GUARD unit from your army (excluding Battle-shocked units) is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.
glossary.full: If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase and a DEATH GUARD unit from your army (excluding Battle-shocked units) is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase. In addition, until you lose control of that objective marker, it has the Nurgle’s Gift ability as if it were a DEATH GUARD model from your army.

glossary.title: Daemon Weapon of Nurgle
glossary.short: DEATH GUARD model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.
glossary.full: DEATH GUARD model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

glossary.title: Furnace of Plagues
glossary.short: DEATH GUARD model only. Add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of the bearers melee weapons, and the bearer’s melee weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.
glossary.full: DEATH GUARD model only. Add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of the bearers melee weapons, and the bearer’s melee weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

glossary.title: Arch Contaminator
glossary.short: DEATH GUARD model only. While the bearer’s unit is within range of an objective marker you control, each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.
glossary.full: DEATH GUARD model only. While the bearer’s unit is within range of an objective marker you control, each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

glossary.title: Revolting Regeneration
glossary.short: DEATH GUARD model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.
glossary.full: DEATH GUARD model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

glossary.title: PUTRID DETONATION
glossary.short: WHEN: Any phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE or DEATH GUARD MONSTER model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
glossary.full: WHEN: Any phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE or DEATH GUARD MONSTER model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed. EFFECT: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted. In addition, any enemy units that suffer mortal wounds as a result of this Stratagem are Afflicted until the start of your next turn.

glossary.title: DISGUSTINGLY RESILIENT
glossary.short: WHEN: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
glossary.full: WHEN: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

glossary.title: PLAGUESURGE
glossary.short: WHEN: Your Command phase. TARGET: Your DEATH GUARD WARLORD that is on the battlefield. EFFECT: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 3" to the Contagion Range of models from your army.
glossary.full: WHEN: Your Command phase. TARGET: Your DEATH GUARD WARLORD that is on the battlefield. EFFECT: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 3" to the Contagion Range of models from your army.

glossary.title: LEECHSPORE ERUPTION
glossary.short: WHEN: Your Command phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD model your army that has lost one or more wounds. EFFECT: Select one enemy unit within 3" of your model.
glossary.full: WHEN: Your Command phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD model your army that has lost one or more wounds. EFFECT: Select one enemy unit within 3" of your model. Roll a number of D6 equal to the number of wounds your model has lost: for each 5+, that enemy unit suffers one mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds) and your model regains 1 lost wound (to a maximum of 6 lost wounds).

glossary.title: OVERWHELMING GENEROSITY
glossary.short: WHEN: Start of your Shooting phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD CHARACTER unit from your army. EFFECT: Select one enemy unit visible to your unit.
glossary.full: WHEN: Start of your Shooting phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD CHARACTER unit from your army. EFFECT: Select one enemy unit visible to your unit. Until the end of the phase, each time a DEATH GUARD unit from your army selects that enemy unit as the target of any ranged attacks, you can re-roll the dice to determine how many attacks a weapon equipped by a model in that unit makes.

glossary.title: CREEPING BLIGHT
glossary.short: WHEN: Your Shooting phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
glossary.full: WHEN: Your Shooting phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an Afflicted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

glossary.title: Mortarion’s Hammer
glossary.short: Purge the Foe, 2DP.
glossary.full: At the start of the battle round, select a number of enemy units more than 12" away from every model from your army that is on the battlefield. Until the end of the battle round, those enemy units are Afflicted. The maximum number of units you can select in this way depends on the battle size, as shown below. Incursion: 1 unit. Strike Force: 2 units. Onslaught: 3 units.

glossary.title: Miasmic Bombardment
glossary.short: At the start of the battle round, select a number of enemy units more than 12" away from every model from your army that is on the battlefield. Until the end of the battle round, those enemy units are Afflicted.
glossary.full: At the start of the battle round, select a number of enemy units more than 12" away from every model from your army that is on the battlefield. Until the end of the battle round, those enemy units are Afflicted. The maximum number of units you can select in this way depends on the battle size, as shown below. Incursion: 1 unit. Strike Force: 2 units. Onslaught: 3 units.

glossary.title: Eye of Affliction
glossary.short: DEATH GUARD model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [ignores cover] ability while targeting an Afflicted enemy unit.
glossary.full: DEATH GUARD model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [ignores cover] ability while targeting an Afflicted enemy unit.

glossary.title: Bilemaw Blight
glossary.short: MALIGNANT PLAGUECASTER only. At the start of your Shooting phase, until the end of the phase, add 12" to the Range characteristics of the bearer’s Plague Wind weapon.
glossary.full: MALIGNANT PLAGUECASTER only. At the start of your Shooting phase, until the end of the phase, add 12" to the Range characteristics of the bearer’s Plague Wind weapon.

glossary.title: Shriekworm Familiar
glossary.short: DEATH GUARD model only. Once per battle round, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP.
glossary.full: DEATH GUARD model only. Once per battle round, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP.

glossary.title: Tendrilous Emissions
glossary.short: LORD OF VIRULENCE only.
glossary.full: LORD OF VIRULENCE only. While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly DEATH GUARD VEHICLE units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability, and each time one of those VEHICLE units makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit visible to the bearer, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

glossary.title: BLIGHTED LAND
glossary.short: WHEN: End of your Movement phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army. EFFECT: Select one terrain feature within 24" of and visible to your unit.
glossary.full: WHEN: End of your Movement phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army. EFFECT: Select one terrain feature within 24" of and visible to your unit. Until the start of your next turn, enemy units are Afflicted while they are within 3" of that terrain feature.

glossary.title: RELENTLESS GRIND
glossary.short: WHEN: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
glossary.full: WHEN: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

glossary.title: DRAWN TO DESPAIR
glossary.short: WHEN: Your Shooting phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
glossary.full: WHEN: Your Shooting phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a visible enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT) within your opponent’s deployment zone, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

glossary.title: FONT OF FILTH
glossary.short: WHEN: Your Shooting phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
glossary.full: WHEN: Your Shooting phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

glossary.title: EYESTINGER STORM
glossary.short: WHEN: Your opponent’s Command phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army. EFFECT: Select one objective marker visible to one or more models in your unit.
glossary.full: WHEN: Your opponent’s Command phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army. EFFECT: Select one objective marker visible to one or more models in your unit. Each Afflicted enemy unit within range of that objective marker must take a Battle-shock test. Enemy units affected by this Stratagem do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

glossary.title: STINKING MIRE
glossary.short: WHEN: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army.
glossary.full: WHEN: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit selects your unit as the target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

glossary.title: Champions of Contagion
glossary.short: Take and Hold, 2DP.
glossary.full: At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the Plagues listed in Nurgle’s Gift. Until the end of the battle, that is your chosen Plague instead of any previously chosen Plague.

glossary.title: Manifold Maladies
glossary.short: At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the Plagues listed in Nurgle’s Gift. Until the end of the battle, that is your chosen Plague instead of any previously chosen Plague.
glossary.full: At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the Plagues listed in Nurgle’s Gift. Until the end of the battle, that is your chosen Plague instead of any previously chosen Plague.

glossary.title: Final Ingredient
glossary.short: BIOLOGUS PUTRIFIER only. Once per battle, after the bearers unit has fought, if one or more CHARACTER models were destroyed as a result of those attacks, select one Plague.
glossary.full: BIOLOGUS PUTRIFIER only. Once per battle, after the bearers unit has fought, if one or more CHARACTER models were destroyed as a result of those attacks, select one Plague. Until the end of the battle, while an enemy unit is Afflicted, that unit has the effect of the selected Plague in addition to any other.

glossary.title: Visions of Virulence
glossary.short: MALIGNANT PLAGUECASTER only. While an enemy unit is enfeebled by the bearer’s Pestilent Fallout ability, that unit is also Afflicted.
glossary.full: MALIGNANT PLAGUECASTER only. While an enemy unit is enfeebled by the bearer’s Pestilent Fallout ability, that unit is also Afflicted.

glossary.title: Needle of Nurgle
glossary.short: PLAGUE SURGEON only. Each time the bearer uses its Tainted Narthecium ability, you can return up to D3 destroyed models to the bearer’s unit (instead of 1).
glossary.full: PLAGUE SURGEON only. Each time the bearer uses its Tainted Narthecium ability, you can return up to D3 destroyed models to the bearer’s unit (instead of 1).

glossary.title: Cornucophagus
glossary.short: LORD OF POXES only. In the Declare Battle Formations step select one Plague.
glossary.full: LORD OF POXES only. In the Declare Battle Formations step select one Plague. Until the end of the battle, while an enemy unit is within Contagion Range of the bearer, that enemy unit has the effect of that Plague in addition to any other.

glossary.title: BLESSINGS OF FILTH
glossary.short: WHEN: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD Attached unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
glossary.full: WHEN: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD Attached unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

glossary.title: MALIGNANCE MAGNIFIED
glossary.short: WHEN: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD Attached unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
glossary.full: WHEN: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD Attached unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

glossary.title: GROTESQUE FORTITUDE
glossary.short: WHEN: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
glossary.full: WHEN: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD Attached unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Toughness characteristic of models in your unit.

glossary.title: RABID INFUSION
glossary.short: WHEN: Start of the Fight phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that includes two CHARACTER models. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Fights First ability.
glossary.full: WHEN: Start of the Fight phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that includes two CHARACTER models. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Fights First ability.

glossary.title: MOBILE VECTOR
glossary.short: WHEN: Your Movement phase, before the Reinforcements step. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD CHARACTER unit from your army that is not leading a unit.
glossary.full: WHEN: Your Movement phase, before the Reinforcements step. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD CHARACTER unit from your army that is not leading a unit. EFFECT: Select one other friendly DEATH GUARD unit (excluding Battle-shocked units and Attached units that already have two Leader units or one of your CHARACTER units leading it] within 2" horizontally and 5" vertically of your unit that your unit can lead (as described in the Leader section of its datasheet]. Your unit attaches to that unit as a Leader. Change that unit’s Starting Strength accordingly.

glossary.title: DEATH’S HEADS
glossary.short: WHEN: Your Shooting phase. TARGET: One BIOLOGUS PUTRIFIER unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
glossary.full: WHEN: Your Shooting phase. TARGET: One BIOLOGUS PUTRIFIER unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and has not been selected to shoot this phase. EFFECT: Select one enemy unit (excluding VEHICLES) that is within 8" of and visible to your unit. Until the start of your next turn, that unit has the effect of all Plagues (see Nurgle’s Gift).

glossary.title: Tallyband Summoners
glossary.short: Disruption, 2DP.
glossary.full: While a PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army is within 7" of one or more DEATH GUARD units from your army, it has the Nurgle’s Gift ability. While a DEATH GUARD unit from your army is within 7" of one or more PLAGUE LEGIONS units from your army, add 3" to that DEATH GUARD unit’s Contagion Range. You can include PLAGUE LEGIONS units in your army even if your Army Faction is DEATH GUARD. The combined points cost of such units depends on the battle size: Incursion: up to 500 pts. Strike Force: up to 1000 pts. Onslaught: up to 1500 pts. No PLAGUE LEGIONS model from your army can be your WARLORD.

glossary.title: Reverberant Rancidity
glossary.short: While a PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army is within 7" of one or more DEATH GUARD units from your army, it has the Nurgle’s Gift ability.
glossary.full: While a PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army is within 7" of one or more DEATH GUARD units from your army, it has the Nurgle’s Gift ability. While a DEATH GUARD unit from your army is within 7" of one or more PLAGUE LEGIONS units from your army, add 3" to that DEATH GUARD unit’s Contagion Range. You can include PLAGUE LEGIONS units in your army even if your Army Faction is DEATH GUARD. The combined points cost of such units depends on the battle size: Incursion: up to 500 pts. Strike Force: up to 1000 pts. Onslaught: up to 1500 pts. No PLAGUE LEGIONS model from your army can be your WARLORD.

glossary.title: Beckoning Blight
glossary.short: DEATH GUARD model only.
glossary.full: DEATH GUARD model only. Each time a PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, if it is set up wholly within 12" of the bearer, it can be set up anywhere that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models, instead of more than 8".

glossary.title: Fell Harvester
glossary.short: DEATH GUARD model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.
glossary.full: DEATH GUARD model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.

glossary.title: Entropic Knell
glossary.short: GREAT UNCLEAN ONE only. In the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, each enemy unit within 6" of the bearer that is below its Starting Strength must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.
glossary.full: GREAT UNCLEAN ONE only. In the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, each enemy unit within 6" of the bearer that is below its Starting Strength must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

glossary.title: Tome of Bounteous Blessings
glossary.short: MALIGNANT PLAGUECASTER only.
glossary.full: MALIGNANT PLAGUECASTER only. Each time a PLAGUE LEGIONS unit within 12" of the bearer takes a Battle-shock test, add 1 to that test and, if that test is passed, one model in that unit regains up to D3 lost wounds (if that unit is a BATTLELINE unit and that test is passed, up to D3 destroyed models can be returned to that unit instead).

glossary.title: PERSISTENT PESTS
glossary.short: WHEN: Any phase. TARGET: One NURGLINGS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can target that unit with this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.
glossary.full: WHEN: Any phase. TARGET: One NURGLINGS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can target that unit with this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed. EFFECT: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength and with its full wounds remaining. RESTRICTIONS: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.

glossary.title: CLUTCHING CORRUPTION
glossary.short: WHEN: Fight phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
glossary.full: WHEN: Fight phase. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more PLAGUE LEGIONS units from your army, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

glossary.title: ALL IS ROT
glossary.short: WHEN: Your Shooting phase. TARGET: One PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
glossary.full: WHEN: Your Shooting phase. TARGET: One PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, enemy units are not considered to be within Engagement Range of your unit for the purposes of selecting targets of ranged weapons. Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model loses a wound, while that model’s unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, roll one D6: on a 5+, your unit suffers 1 mortal wound after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks.

glossary.title: FLESHY AVALANCHE
glossary.short: WHEN: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase. TARGET: One PLAGUE LEGIONS MONSTER unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
glossary.full: WHEN: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase. TARGET: One PLAGUE LEGIONS MONSTER unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

glossary.title: AVATARS OF DECAY
glossary.short: WHEN: Your Shooting phase. TARGET: One PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, while an enemy unit is within 6" of your unit, that enemy unit is Afflicted.
glossary.full: WHEN: Your Shooting phase. TARGET: One PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, while an enemy unit is within 6" of your unit, that enemy unit is Afflicted.

glossary.title: MIRESLICK
glossary.short: WHEN: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is selected to Fall Back. TARGET: One PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
glossary.full: WHEN: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is selected to Fall Back. TARGET: One PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, while an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, each time that unit is selected to Fall Back, it must take a Leadership test. If that test is failed, that unit must Remain Stationary this phase instead.

glossary.title: Shamblerot Vectorium
glossary.short: Disruption, 2DP.
glossary.full: In your Command phase in each of the following battle rounds, depending on your chosen battle size, add a new POXWALKERS unit with a Starting Strength of 10 to your army, in Strategic Reserves. Incursion: battle rounds 2 and 3. Strike Force: battle rounds 2, 3 and 4. Onslaught: battle rounds 2, 3, 4 and 5. POXWALKERS units from your army gain the BATTLELINE keyword.

glossary.title: Numberless Horde
glossary.short: In your Command phase in each of the following battle rounds, depending on your chosen battle size, add a new POXWALKERS unit with a Starting Strength of 10 to your army, in Strategic Reserves. Incursion: battle rounds 2 and 3.
glossary.full: In your Command phase in each of the following battle rounds, depending on your chosen battle size, add a new POXWALKERS unit with a Starting Strength of 10 to your army, in Strategic Reserves. Incursion: battle rounds 2 and 3. Strike Force: battle rounds 2, 3 and 4. Onslaught: battle rounds 2, 3, 4 and 5. POXWALKERS units from your army gain the BATTLELINE keyword.

glossary.title: Witherbone Pipes
glossary.short: NOXIOUS BLIGHTBRINGER only. While the bearer is leading a POXWALKERS unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit, and each time that unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, add 1 to that test.
glossary.full: NOXIOUS BLIGHTBRINGER only. While the bearer is leading a POXWALKERS unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit, and each time that unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, add 1 to that test.

glossary.title: Lord of the Walking Pox
glossary.short: DEATH GUARD model only. If the bearer is leading a POXWALKER unit, and is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round as the third battle round.
glossary.full: DEATH GUARD model only. If the bearer is leading a POXWALKER unit, and is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round as the third battle round.

glossary.title: Sorrowsyphon
glossary.short: MALIGNANT PLAGUECASTER only. While the bearer is leading a POXWALKERS unit, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s Plague Wind weapon.
glossary.full: MALIGNANT PLAGUECASTER only. While the bearer is leading a POXWALKERS unit, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s Plague Wind weapon. Each time the bearer makes one or more attacks with a Plague Wind weapon, after the bearer’s unit has resolved its attacks, D3 Bodyguard models from the bearer’s unit are destroyed.

glossary.title: Talisman of Burgeoning
glossary.short: DEATH GUARD model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of POXWALKERS models in that unit.
glossary.full: DEATH GUARD model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of POXWALKERS models in that unit.

glossary.title: GRIP OF THE WALKING POX
glossary.short: WHEN: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. TARGET: One POXWALKERS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
glossary.full: WHEN: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. TARGET: One POXWALKERS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks. EFFECT: After the attacking unit has fought, roll one D6 for each model from your unit that was destroyed as a result of those attacks: on a 6, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound. If your unit is not destroyed after the attacking unit has fought, enemy models destroyed as a result of this Stratagem count as enemy models destroyed by an attack made by a model in your unit for the purposes of the Curse of the Walking Pox ability.

glossary.title: SMEARED WITH FILTH
glossary.short: WHEN: Fight phase. TARGET: One POXWALKERS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can target that unit with this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.
glossary.full: WHEN: Fight phase. TARGET: One POXWALKERS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can target that unit with this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed. EFFECT: Select one enemy unit that made one or more attacks that targeted your unit this phase. Until the end of the battle, that enemy unit is Afflicted.

glossary.title: GNAWING HUNGER
glossary.short: WHEN: Your Command phase. TARGET: One POXWALKERS unit from your army.
glossary.full: WHEN: Your Command phase. TARGET: One POXWALKERS unit from your army. EFFECT: Until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Move characteristic of models in your unit, and add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit.

glossary.title: HIDDEN AMONGST THE DEAD
glossary.short: WHEN: The Reinforcements step of your Movement phase. TARGET: One POXWALKERS unit from your army that is in Strategic Reserves and that is not an Attached unit.
glossary.full: WHEN: The Reinforcements step of your Movement phase. TARGET: One POXWALKERS unit from your army that is in Strategic Reserves and that is not an Attached unit. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, models in that unit have the Deep Strike ability.

glossary.title: SHOCK AND HORROR
glossary.short: WHEN: Your Charge phase, just after a DEATH GUARD unit from your army ends a Charge move. TARGET: That DEATH GUARD unit.
glossary.full: WHEN: Your Charge phase, just after a DEATH GUARD unit from your army ends a Charge move. TARGET: That DEATH GUARD unit. EFFECT: Each enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

glossary.title: SHAMBLING WALL
glossary.short: WHEN: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
glossary.full: WHEN: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. TARGET: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks, and one friendly POXWALKERS unit within 3" of your unit and visible to both your unit and the attacking unit. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time you would allocate an attack to a model in your DEATH GUARD unit, if your POXWALKERS unit is visible to the attacking model and is an eligible target for that attack, no saving throw is made for that attack; instead a number of POXWALKERS from your POXWALKERS unit equal to the Damage characteristic of that attack are destroyed.

glossary.title: Death Lord’s Chosen
glossary.short: Priority Assets, 2DP.
glossary.full: In your opponent’s Command phase, roll 2D6 for each Afflicted enemy unit, subtracting 1 from the result if that unit is Below Half-strength. If the result is 6 or less, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

glossary.title: Deadly Vectors
glossary.short: In your opponent’s Command phase, roll 2D6 for each Afflicted enemy unit, subtracting 1 from the result if that unit is Below Half-strength. If the result is 6 or less, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.
glossary.full: In your opponent’s Command phase, roll 2D6 for each Afflicted enemy unit, subtracting 1 from the result if that unit is Below Half-strength. If the result is 6 or less, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

glossary.title: Face of Death
glossary.short: TERMINATOR model only. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit must take a Battle-shock test.
glossary.full: TERMINATOR model only. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit must take a Battle-shock test.

glossary.title: Vile Vigour
glossary.short: TERMINATOR model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1" to the Movement characteristic of models in that unit and you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.
glossary.full: TERMINATOR model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1" to the Movement characteristic of models in that unit and you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

glossary.title: Warprot Talisman
glossary.short: TERMINATOR model only.
glossary.full: TERMINATOR model only. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

glossary.title: Helm of the Fly King
glossary.short: TERMINATOR model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking model is within 18".
glossary.full: TERMINATOR model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking model is within 18".

glossary.title: BLOOMING PESTILENCE
glossary.short: WHEN: Start of any phase. TARGET: One TERMINATOR unit from your army. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, add 3" to the Contagion Range of models in your unit.
glossary.full: WHEN: Start of any phase. TARGET: One TERMINATOR unit from your army. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, add 3" to the Contagion Range of models in your unit.

glossary.title: GRIM REAPERS
glossary.short: WHEN: Fight phase. TARGET: One TERMINATOR unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
glossary.full: WHEN: Fight phase. TARGET: One TERMINATOR unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) you can re-roll the Hit roll.

glossary.title: UNDYING SPITE
glossary.short: WHEN: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. TARGET: One TERMINATOR unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
glossary.full: WHEN: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. TARGET: One TERMINATOR unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

glossary.title: SIGNAL POX
glossary.short: WHEN: Your Command phase. TARGET: One LORD OF VIRULENCE model from your army. EFFECT: Select one objective marker within 30" of and visible to your model.
glossary.full: WHEN: Your Command phase. TARGET: One LORD OF VIRULENCE model from your army. EFFECT: Select one objective marker within 30" of and visible to your model. Until the start of your next turn, while an enemy unit is within range of that objective marker, that unit is Afflicted.

glossary.title: MORTARION'S TEACHINGS
glossary.short: WHEN: Your Shooting phase. TARGET: One TERMINATOR unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
glossary.full: WHEN: Your Shooting phase. TARGET: One TERMINATOR unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] and [HEAVY] abilities.

glossary.title: SICKENING IMPACT

glossary.full: This keyword identifies models and units affected by rules that explicitly reference it. The keyword has no additional effect unless a rule refers to it.
